description:
To set the runtime status of the net.ipv4.tcp_rfc1337 kernel parameter, run the following command: 
$ sudo sysctl -w net.ipv4.tcp_rfc1337=1
To make sure that the setting is persistent, add the following line to a file in the directory /etc/sysctl.d: 
net.ipv4.tcp_rfc1337 = 1
rationale:
Enable TCP behavior conformant with RFC 1337. When disabled, if a RST is
received in TIME_WAIT state, we close the socket immediately without waiting
for the end of the TIME_WAIT period.
ocil_clause: the correct value is not returned
ocil:
The runtime status of the net.ipv4.tcp_rfc1337 kernel parameter can be queried by running the following command: 
$ sysctl net.ipv4.tcp_rfc1337
1.
title: Enable Kernel Parameter to Use TCP RFC 1337 on IPv4 Interfaces
